title: Worthy Food
description: Yet another food mod. Balanced and simple to craft food, without polluting your world with tons of useless crops
body:
## Vanilla food is not pleasing anymore? Want something new? ![Worthy Food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VmH6bkgA/images/a0b37705c24cb3bc04e223dc8d0ce9b821403a3f.png) ### About the mod Worthy food mod provides various food to craft. Crafts themselves are not hard.
Some food consumes faster than usual, but restores less hunger
Mod will not pollute your world with tons of useless crops. Most of the crafts use vanilla ingredients ### Work in Progress The mod just started existing, so we gradually will add new food over time
The updates will mostly be themed, like "Japanese food", "French food" etc.
Balance / recipes / textures will be updated over time as well
There may be bugs, feel free to join our discord(ru/en) and tell us about them
New Food
NAME RESTORES HUNGER CONSUMING TIME
Apple Pie 8 hunger (16/20 halves) Standard
Sweet Berry Pie 8 hunger (16/20 halves) Standard
Glow Berry Pie 8 hunger (16/20 halves) Standard
Carrot Pie 8 hunger (16/20 halves) Standard
Toast with Apple Jam 6.5 hunger (13/20 halves) Standard
Toast with Sweet Berry Jam 6.5 hunger (13/20 halves) Standard
Toast with Glow Berry Jam 6.5 hunger (13/20 halves) Standard
Fried Egg with Bacon 6.5 hunger (13/20 halves) 2x faster
Cooked Beef Barbecue 6 hunger (12/20 halves) Standard
Caramel Apple 5 hunger (10/20 halves) 2x faster
Cooked Bacon 4 hunger (8/20 halves) 2x faster
Biscuit 4 hunger (8/20 halves) Standard
Toast 3.5 hunger (7/20 halves) Standard
Apple Juice 3.5 hunger (7/20 halves) 2x faster
Sweet Berry Juice 3.5 hunger (7/20 halves) 2x faster
Melon Juice 3.5 hunger (7/20 halves) 2x faster
Glass of Cocoa 3.5 hunger (7/20 halves) 2x faster
Apple Jam 3 hunger (6/20 halves) 2x faster
Sweet Berry Jam 3 hunger (6/20 halves) 2x faster
Glow Berry Jam 3 hunger (6/20 halves) 2x faster
Ice Cream 2.5 hunger (5/20 halves) 2x faster
Fried Egg 2.5 hunger (5/20 halves) 2x faster
Raw Bacon 2 hunger (4/20 halves) 2x faster
Raw Beef Barbecue 2 hunger (4/20 halves) Standard
Slice of Cheese 1.5 hunger (3/20 halves) 3x faster
New Items/Ingredients
Dough
Flour
Cooking Pot
Knife
Caramel
### Also try my other mods
